ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the property */,
  "rent_per_night" REAL /* Rental rate per night */,
  "tax_per_night" REAL /* Tax per night */,
  "max_occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum occupancy of the property */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available at the property */,
  "images" TEXT /* URLs of images of the property */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the property is available for booking */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the property details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the customer for loyalty rewards */,
  "last_visit" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last visit to a property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer profile was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being booked */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the booking */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the booking */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the booking */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the booking */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking, including taxes */,
  "confirmation_number" TEXT /* Unique confirmation number for the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, canceled) */,
  "guest_count" INTEGER /* Number of guests for the booking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the booking was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_discount FOREIGN KEY ("discount") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_amount"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "discount_name" TEXT /* Name of the discount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of the discount in dollars */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date of the discount validity */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* End date of the discount validity */,
  "minimum_stay" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required to apply the discount */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the discount was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
